posts.author: guy.gavish (Guygav)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi guys,

I believe many of you would like to allow your users to update some details remotely without access to some classified boards.

You can do it today with SuperForm!

I invite you to watch this 2 minutes simple video of how you can do it.

Enjoy SuperForm
